<{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::test]

<{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::component::parent]

<{%reset%}>    [id=c6b02a56-f464-4318-84be-3943773f78d1]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 3%}>~ pkgA:m:typA: (update)
<{%reset%}>        [id=f511c6b2-ab9a-4db3-a878-2e3574ad6681]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>        [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::component$pkgA:m:typA::child]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>      + foo: <{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>"bar"<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>
